gloss_en: Basque is beautiful and old.
notes: Souletin front-rounded ⟨ü⟩ [y] 'üskara' per egurtzegi2013; laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'zaharra' and ⟨h⟩ [h] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: We have learned the word.
notes: Souletin 'gü' (we), 'dügü' with ⟨ü⟩ [y] per lafon1999; laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hitza' and ⟨h⟩ [h] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: That water is cold.
notes: Souletin 'hür' (water) [y] and 'düzü' per egurtzegi2013; laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza' and ⟨h⟩ [h] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The small house is white.
notes: Souletin 'txipi' (small) and 'züri' [y]; post-alveolar affricate ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'etxe', 'txipia' per lafon1999.

gloss_en: I have departed for the village.
notes: Souletin aspirated stop ⟨ph⟩ [pʰ] 'phartitü' and ⟨ü⟩ [y] 'nüzü' per egurtzegi2013; trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'herrialat'.

gloss_en: I have finished my work.
notes: Souletin ⟨ü⟩ [y] 'ürhentü', 'düt' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'ürhentü' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: The rooster is singing in the morning.
notes: Souletin aspirated ⟨kh⟩ [kʰ] 'khantari' and 'düzü' [y]; trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'oilarra' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: I am sick, I am in pain.
notes: Souletin 'gaixu' and 'nüzü' [y]; post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'gaixua' and laminal ⟨z⟩ [s̻] 'minez' per lafon1999.

gloss_en: My heart is pounding.
notes: ⟨h⟩ [h] 'bihotza' and laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The lady gave me the book.
notes: Souletin dative 'deitazü' [y] and article '-ia'; vowel-junction 'anderiak liburia'? coverage per lafon1999.

sentence: Onddo eder bat hartü dügü oihanian.
ipa: onɟo eder bat harty dyɡy oi̯hanian
gloss_en: We took a fine mushroom in the wood.
notes: Souletin 'hartü', 'dügü' [y]; palatal plosive ⟨dd⟩ [ɟ] 'onddo' and ⟨h⟩ [h] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: A drop has fallen to the ground.
notes: Souletin 'lür' [y] and 'düzü'; palatal plosive ⟨tt⟩ [c] 'ttantta' and trill 'lürrilat' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: A little mouse runs off.
notes: Souletin 'xagü' [y]; post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'xagü' and ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txipi' per lafon1999.

gloss_en: You must wash your hand.
notes: Souletin 'garbitü', 'düzü' [y]; apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'eskia' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'behar' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: Let us speak with one another.
notes: Souletin 'algarreki'; laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'mintza' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] per lafon1999.

gloss_en: The salt and pepper on the table.
notes: Souletin palatal nasal 'mahañ', 'gañ' [ɲ]; laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'gatza' and ⟨h⟩ [h] per lafon1999.

gloss_en: The tree is losing its leaves.
notes: Souletin 'zühañ' with ⟨ü⟩ [y] and palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; ⟨h⟩ [h] and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'galtzen' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: The girl and the boy walk together.
notes: Souletin 'algarreki'; apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'neska' and laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'dabiltza' per lafon1999.

gloss_en: The old castle stands on the little hill.
notes: Souletin 'gaztelü' [y], palatal nasal 'gañ' [ɲ] and post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'mendixkaren' per egurtzegi2013.

gloss_en: When do the village festivals begin?
notes: Souletin 'nuiz'; ⟨h⟩ [h] 'herriko', 'hasten' and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] per hualde2018_aspiration.
